input_text:
Chose the observability stack for the new platform.

Metrics and dashboards: Prometheus + Grafana. Prometheus is the de facto standard for Kubernetes metrics collection. Grafana for dashboards. Both integrate with Kubernetes natively. The team has experience with both.

Distributed tracing: OpenTelemetry SDK in all services, sending traces to a Tempo backend. OpenTelemetry is vendor-neutral — if we want to switch from Tempo to Jaeger or a hosted solution later, we change the exporter, not the instrumentation code. Tempo is free, runs in our cluster.

Both decisions were also driven by the existing expertise of our DevOps contractor who set up the initial cluster.

expected.text: Metrics and dashboards: Prometheus + Grafana — de facto K8s standard, native integration, team experience
Distributed tracing: OpenTelemetry SDK in all services exporting to Tempo — vendor-neutral instrumentation, free, runs in-cluster
